methods.description: Statistical procedures used to analyze the diversity and preferences of O. cornifrons pollen across different landscapes and sites.

steps.description: Estimate and compare Richness, Shannon diversity, and Simpson dominance indices between landscapes and sites nested within landscape using generalized linear model (GLM) in JMP.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GLM to estimate and compare diversity indices

steps.description: Use non-metric multidimensional scaling (NMDS) using PRIMER v6 to determine differences in provisions between landscapes for pollen species or genera.
steps.searchable_summary: conduct NMDS analysis using PRIMER v6

steps.description: Conduct ANOSIM with 10,000 permutations to analyze pairwise differences between landscapes.
Investigate relative proportions of East-Asian versus non-Asian pollen of all plant species across all provisions between landscapes using GLM.
Analyze differences in pollen family and genera collected across landscapes using GLM.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GLM to analyze pollen family and genera differences

steps.description: Use a 2 × 2 chi-square contingency analysis to determine differences in proportions of pollen collected from Asian versus non-Asian, and Rosaceae/Fabaceae versus non-Rosaceae/Fabaceae pollen.
Investigate differences in the abundance of pollen collected from Asian versus non-Asian Rosaceae species between landscapes with NMDS and GLM.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze Rosaceae pollen abundance using NMDS and GLM

steps.description: Conduct all GLM analyses in JMP with landscape and site nested in landscape as independent factors, with average RRA as the dependent variable with Poisson distributions; use Wilcoxon tests for post-hoc comparisons.
steps.searchable_summary: perform GLM and Wilcoxon tests in JMP

methods.description: Setup and placement of O. cornifrons nests in various landscapes to study their pollen collection behavior.

steps.description: Place O. cornifrons nests on field edges of three predominantly apple and three predominantly cherry orchards.
steps.searchable_summary: set up nests in apple and cherry orchards

steps.description: Place nests in a suburban site and in a wooded forest site representing non-orchard heterogeneous landscapes.
steps.searchable_summary: set up nests in suburban and forest sites

steps.description: Collect 12 complete larval provisions from cells of different individual nests per site where eggs failed to hatch.
